description_for_human: Professional auto body, paint, and collision repair in Uvita, Costa Rica.
description_for_model: Book a repair estimate or ask about services offered by Uvita Body Shop — a 9-year-experienced auto body and paint workshop in Uvita (Puntarenas), Costa Rica. Services: frame repair, full paint, touch-ups, dent repair, accessory installation. Paint brands: Roberlo, BESA, 3M, VICCO. Hours: Mon-Sat 8am-5pm. Contact via WhatsApp at +506 8769-9927.
